data.title: GCP Infra Expands Buyback as Treasury Stock Tops 46 Million Shares
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) has shared an update.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing 391,315 ordinary shares at a volume-weighted average price of 74.65 pence on 22 April 2026 through RBC Europe. Following this latest transaction, the company has 884,797,669 ordinary shares in issue, of which 63,237,283 are held in treasury, leaving 821,560,386 voting shares in circulation.

Since the buyback initiative began in December 2024, GCP Infra has acquired a total of 46,252,264 shares for treasury, underscoring an ongoing effort to manage capital and potentially enhance net asset value per share. The updated voting rights figure provides an important reference point for investors and other stakeholders assessing disclosure thresholds under regulatory rules and monitoring changes in ownership positions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GCP) stock is a Buy with a £90.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP stock, see the GB:GCP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GCP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GCP is a Outperform.

The score is primarily driven by strong balance-sheet conservatism and improving cash generation, supported by constructive technical trend signals. Offsetting these positives are inconsistent/declining revenue trends and a demanding P/E despite an attractive dividend yield, with corporate actions (dividend stability and buybacks) providing additional support.

To see Spark’s full report on GCP stock, click here.

More about GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited is a closed-ended investment company and FTSE 250 constituent whose shares trade on the main market of the London Stock Exchange. The firm targets UK infrastructure debt and related assets, focusing on long-term, public sector-backed, availability-based revenue projects, often structured with partial inflation protection and aligned with positive environmental outcomes, as recognised by the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark.

Average Trading Volume: 2,203,542

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Seafire calls 2026 AGM, proposes no 2025 dividend and expanded share authorisations
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Seafire AB ( (SE:SEAF) ) has issued an announcement.

Seafire AB has called its Annual General Meeting for 22 May 2026 at the company’s Stockholm office, setting out participation rules for shareholders, including record-date, registration deadlines and procedures for nominee-registered investors and proxy representation. The agenda covers standard corporate governance items such as adoption of the 2025 accounts, discharge of liability for the board and CEO, board and auditor elections, approval of the remuneration report and several authorisations related to share issues, share buybacks, share transfers and a new warrant programme.

The board proposes that no dividend be paid for the 2025 financial year, with all available funds carried forward, signalling a preference to retain capital within the company rather than distribute cash to shareholders. The nomination committee recommends a five-member board, the election of a registered audit firm and higher remuneration for the chair of the board, while also proposing that CFO Per Bodén chair the AGM, changes that together underscore an emphasis on strengthened governance and financial flexibility ahead of potential capital market activities.

More about Seafire AB

Seafire AB is a Stockholm-based public company that operates as an investment group, acquiring and developing smaller businesses in various sectors. Listed in Sweden, the company focuses on long-term value creation through active ownership and financial discipline, with governance overseen by a board of directors and supported by external auditors.

Average Trading Volume: 52,863

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK426.4M

data.title: Hindustan Unilever to Transfer Unclaimed Shares and Dividends to IEPF
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hindustan Unilever Limited ( (IN:HINDUNILVR) ) has issued an announcement.

Hindustan Unilever Limited has notified equity shareholders that, in compliance with the Companies Act, 2013 and the Investor Education and Protection Fund (IEPF) Rules, it will transfer shares linked to dividends that have remained unpaid or unclaimed for seven consecutive years to the IEPF account. The company has published notices in national and regional newspapers and is directly contacting affected shareholders, urging them to encash past dividends, update required KYC details, and submit necessary forms to avoid transfer of their dividends and shares to the IEPF, after which claims must be made only through the IEPF Authority.

The notice specifically covers shareholders who have not encashed the final dividend for FY 2018-19, the interim dividend for FY 2019-20, and subsequent dividends, and it explains that no claim will lie against the company once the amounts and shares are moved to the IEPF. This move underscores Hindustan Unilever’s adherence to evolving Indian securities and corporate governance regulations, while signaling to investors the operational need to keep records current and proactively monitor and claim dividends to preserve their shareholdings and related entitlements.

More about Hindustan Unilever Limited

Hindustan Unilever Limited is a leading Indian fast-moving consumer goods company, part of the global Unilever group, with a broad portfolio spanning home care, personal care, food, and beverages brands. The company focuses on mass and premium consumer markets across India, distributing its products through extensive urban and rural retail networks.

Average Trading Volume: 104,149

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 5252.5B INR

data.title: FS Bancorp Posts Q1 Earnings, Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FS Bancorp ( (FSBW) ) has issued an update.

FS Bancorp, Inc., the parent of 1st Security Bank of Washington, provides a mix of commercial, consumer and real estate lending, deposit products, cash management services and home mortgage origination across its Commercial and Consumer Banking and Home Lending segments. The bank maintains a sizable loan portfolio in commercial real estate and consumer lending, and continues to build out its geographic reach, including projected expansion into the Portland, Oregon market.

On April 21, 2026, FS Bancorp reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $7.8 million, or $1.02 per diluted share, slightly below both the prior quarter and the year-ago period, though pre-tax income rose 4.6% year-over-year to $9.9 million. The board declared its 53rd consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share, supported by stable core deposits of $2.31 billion, 4.9% annual loan growth, a record split-adjusted book value per share of $42.42, stronger Home Lending production and solid regulatory capital ratios, while share repurchases underscored ongoing capital return to investors.

Management highlighted the announced February merger with Pacific West Bancorp and anticipated 2026 entry into the Portland, Oregon market as strategic growth drivers. Segment results showed $6.7 million in net income from Commercial and Consumer Banking and $1.1 million from Home Lending, with improved mortgage activity and disciplined deposit pricing contributing to earnings resilience despite a higher effective tax rate and softness in consumer loan balances.

The most recent analyst rating on (FSBW) stock is a Hold with a $46.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FS Bancorp stock, see the FSBW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FSBW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FSBW is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by 2025 fundamental weakness (sharp revenue decline and a major drop in operating/free cash flow) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting factors include attractive valuation (low P/E and solid dividend yield) and generally positive corporate developments (accretive M&A and a dividend increase).

To see Spark’s full report on FSBW stock, click here.

More about FS Bancorp

FS Bancorp, Inc., the holding company for 1st Security Bank of Washington, operates through Commercial and Consumer Banking and Home Lending segments. It offers deposit products, residential, consumer, business and commercial real estate lending, cash management services, and originates one-to-four-family residential mortgages, with a growing focus on markets including the Portland, Oregon area.

The Commercial and Consumer Banking segment manages the bank’s investment portfolio and other assets, while the Home Lending segment primarily sells mortgage loans into secondary markets. Together these operations support a loan book centered on commercial real estate and high-credit-quality consumer home improvement lending, underpinned by solid regulatory capital ratios.

Average Trading Volume: 11,261

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $313M

data.title: Costain CEO and CFO Boost Equity Stakes After Exercising Incentive Awards
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Costain ( (GB:COST) ) is now available.

Costain disclosed that chief executive Alex Vaughan and chief financial officer Helen Willis have exercised substantial nil-cost share options under the company’s 2014 Long Term Incentive Plan and 2023 Share Deferral Plan. Both executives sold part of the resulting shares to meet tax and National Insurance obligations, with Willis transferring her remaining balance to her spouse.

Following these transactions, Vaughan’s total beneficial shareholding, including qualifying awards, is valued at about £4.24m, equivalent to 764% of his salary, while Willis’s beneficial interest is valued at roughly £2.59m, or 555% of her salary. The enlarged holdings materially exceed Costain’s guideline of 200% of salary for senior management share ownership, underlining strong equity alignment between the leadership team and shareholders, though Vaughan has instructed a further sale of his remaining exercised shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:COST) stock is a Hold with a £180.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Costain stock, see the GB:COST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on COST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, COST is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial stability and earnings quality (higher margins, low leverage, solid cash conversion), supported by strong technical uptrend signals. Valuation is reasonable but not deeply compelling, and the key risk tempering the score is the multi-year revenue contraction, which could limit future growth if it persists.

To see Spark’s full report on COST stock, click here.

More about Costain

Costain Group PLC is a UK-based engineering and construction company focused on infrastructure, transportation, energy and water projects. The group provides consulting, design, delivery and technology-led solutions for major public and private sector clients, positioning itself as a key contractor in large-scale national infrastructure programmes.

Average Trading Volume: 1,615,027

The latest update is out from Aurora Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:ARR) ).

Aurora UK Alpha PLC has repurchased 50,000 ordinary shares of 25p each at 243.1332 pence per share under an existing authority and will hold the acquired stock in treasury, adjusting its capital base without cancelling the shares. Following this transaction, the company now holds 5,662,557 shares in treasury and has 108,910,185 voting rights in issue, a figure shareholders are expected to use when calculating their interests under FCA disclosure and transparency requirements.

The move signals continued active management of Aurora UK Alpha’s share capital, which can support net asset value per share and potentially enhance shareholder value by concentrating voting power among remaining free‑float investors. The updated voting rights total also provides greater clarity for investors and regulators monitoring ownership thresholds and compliance with UK market disclosure rules.

Spark’s Take on ARR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARR is a Neutral.

The score is supported primarily by a very strong, low-risk balance sheet and an attractive low P/E valuation. These positives are tempered by highly volatile earnings/cash flows and weak technical momentum with the stock trading below key moving averages.

To see Spark’s full report on ARR stock, click here.

More about Aurora Investment Trust PLC

Aurora UK Alpha PLC is a listed investment vehicle operating in the UK, structured as a public limited company and managed with the support of Frostrow Capital LLP as company secretary. It issues ordinary shares and actively manages its capital structure, including the use of share buybacks and treasury share holdings to influence its equity base and voting rights framework.

data.title: Wihlborgs AGM Backs Dividend, Share Buyback Mandate and Board Changes
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB ( (SE:WIHL) ) just unveiled an update.

Shareholders in Wihlborgs Fastigheter approved a dividend of SEK 3.30 per share for the 2025 financial year at the company’s 22 April 2026 annual general meeting, with the payout scheduled via Euroclear Sweden later in April. The meeting also granted discharge from liability to the board and CEO for 2025, signaling investor confidence in the company’s governance.

The AGM renewed and expanded the board’s financial flexibility by authorizing repurchases and disposals of up to 10 percent of its own shares and permitting new share issues of up to 10 percent of the share capital at market price, potentially without preferential rights. Shareholders re-elected five directors, added two new board members, confirmed total board fees of SEK 2.4 million, and reappointed Öhrlings PricewaterhouseCoopers AB as auditor with Eva Carlsvi as auditor-in-charge, underscoring continuity in oversight as Wihlborgs navigates its regional commercial property markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:WIHL) stock is a Buy with a SEK105.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB stock, see the SE:WIHL Stock Forecast page.

More about Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB

Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB is a Swedish property company specializing in commercial real estate in the Öresund region, with a portfolio concentrated in Malmö, Helsingborg, Lund and Copenhagen. The company is a leading landlord in Malmö, Lund and Helsingborg, holds properties with a book value of SEK 66 billion and annual rental income of SEK 5.1 billion, and its shares trade on Nasdaq Stockholm’s Large Cap list.

Average Trading Volume: 533,353

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK27.73B

data.title: SRx Health Shifts Capital Toward AI and Space Investments
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

The latest announcement is out from SRx Health Solutions ( (SRXH) ).

On April 22, 2026, SRx Health Solutions announced that its wholly owned pet-focused subsidiary, Halo, Purely for Pets, invested more than 10% of the company’s investable capital in Astro Investment XVII, an affiliate of Astro Capital structured as a special purpose vehicle. The commitment marks a sizable redeployment of treasury assets into the convergence of artificial intelligence and space technologies, reflecting a strategic bet on high-growth, frontier sectors that could reshape the company’s portfolio profile and appeal to shareholders seeking exposure to emerging tech themes.

The move comes alongside SRx’s pending merger with EMJ Crypto Technologies, which is expected to deepen its capabilities in managing digital and alternative assets within its treasury operations. The combination of a large allocation to an AI-and-space SPV and the ongoing merger underscores SRx’s shift toward a more innovation-driven, diversified capital strategy that may alter its risk-return balance and position it more prominently at the intersection of health, technology, and digital finance.

Spark’s Take on SRXH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRXH is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (large losses, high leverage, and negative recent cash flows). Technicals remain pressured with the stock below longer-term moving averages and slightly negative momentum. Corporate events provide some support via financing and capital-structure simplification, but the NYSE compliance warning adds meaningful risk; valuation is also challenged by loss-making results and no dividend signal.

To see Spark’s full report on SRXH stock, click here.

More about SRx Health Solutions

SRx Health Solutions, Inc., listed on the NYSE American under the ticker SRXH, operates in the health solutions sector and manages its capital through both traditional and digital-asset-focused platforms. The company has entered into a definitive merger agreement with EMJ Crypto Technologies, a digital-asset treasury operating platform, signaling a strategic move toward integrating digital asset management into its broader corporate and investment strategy.

data.title: Green Oleo Publishes Board and Auditor Candidate Lists Ahead of April Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Green Oleo S.P.A. ( (IT:GRN) ) has issued an update.

Green Oleo S.P.A. has published the lists of candidates for the renewal of its Board of Directors and Board of Statutory Auditors ahead of the ordinary and extraordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for 30 April 2026. A single slate was filed by major shareholders BB S.r.l. and FB S.r.l., which together control more than 60% of the share capital and nearly 80% of the voting rights, underscoring their dominant role in the company’s governance and likely ensuring continuity in strategic oversight.

The candidate lists are now available to the public at the company’s registered office and on its website in the shareholders’ meeting section. This step formalizes the governance proposal that shareholders will vote on, providing transparency for investors and signalling a stable ownership structure at a time when Green Oleo continues to position itself as a key European player in renewable, biodegradable oleochemicals for a wide range of industrial applications.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:GRN) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Green Oleo S.P.A. stock, see the IT:GRN Stock Forecast page.

More about Green Oleo S.P.A.

Green Oleo S.P.A., based in Cremona and listed on Euronext Growth Milan, is among the leading European producers of specialty oleochemicals from renewable and biodegradable sources. Established in 2012 following the Buzzella family’s acquisition of a historic oleochemical business dating back to 1923, the company processes local by-products of the food industry into distilled fatty acids, stearic and oleic acids, glycerines, soaps and esters, serving industrial customers in detergents, elastomers, candles, paints, rubber, tyres, personal care and cosmetics.

Average Trading Volume: 10,387

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €21.35M

See more insights into GRN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
